porter.en: A porter carried our bags to the room.
porter.zh: 一位行李員把我們的行李搬到房間。

posture.en: Good posture keeps your back healthy.
posture.zh: 良好的姿勢讓你的背部健康。

potent.en: The medicine is potent, so use it carefully.
potent.zh: 這藥效力很強，所以要小心使用。

poultry.en: The farm raises poultry such as chickens.
poultry.zh: 這座農場飼養雞之類的家禽。

precede.en: A short speech preceded the dinner.
precede.zh: 晚餐前先有一段簡短的致詞。

precedent.en: The judge's decision set a precedent.

precision.en: The watch was made with great precision.
precision.zh: 這支錶製作得非常精準。

predecessor.en: She learned a lot from her predecessor.
predecessor.zh: 她從前任那裡學到很多。

prehistoric.zh: 這個洞穴有史前的壁畫。

premiere.zh: 我們參加了這部電影的首映。

preside.en: The chairperson presided over the meeting.

prestige.en: The award added to her prestige.
prestige.zh: 這個獎項增添了她的聲望。

preview.en: We watched a preview of the new film.
preview.zh: 我們看了新電影的預告。

probe.en: The space probe sent back photos of Mars.
probe.zh: 太空探測器傳回了火星的照片。

procession.en: A funeral procession moved down the street.
procession.zh: 送葬隊伍沿著街道行進。

proficiency.en: The test measures your English proficiency.
proficiency.zh: 這個測驗評量你的英語能力。

prohibition.en: There is a prohibition on hunting here.

propel.en: The engine propels the boat forward.

prose.en: She writes both poetry and prose.

prosecute.en: The state will prosecute the thief.

prototype.en: Engineers built a prototype of the car.
prototype.zh: 工程師打造了這輛車的原型。

proverb.en: An old proverb says haste makes waste.
proverb.zh: 一句古諺說欲速則不達。

provincial.en: She works for the provincial government.

psychiatry.en: He studied psychiatry to help the mentally ill.
psychiatry.zh: 他研讀精神醫學以幫助精神病患。

psychic.en: Some people claim to have psychic powers.
psychic.zh: 有些人聲稱擁有靈異能力。

publicize.en: They publicized the event on social media.
publicize.zh: 他們在社群媒體上宣傳這個活動。

puff.en: A puff of smoke rose from the chimney.

punctual.en: She is always punctual for meetings.

purity.en: We tested the purity of the gold.
purity.zh: 我們檢測了黃金的純度。

quake.en: The ground quaked during the earthquake.

qualification.en: She has the right qualifications for the job.
qualification.zh: 她具備這份工作所需的資格。

radiant.en: The bride looked radiant on her wedding day.
radiant.zh: 新娘在婚禮當天容光煥發。

radiate.en: The fire radiated warmth into the room.

radioactive.en: Radioactive waste must be stored safely.
radioactive.zh: 放射性廢料必須安全儲存。

radish.en: She added a sliced radish to the salad.
radish.zh: 她在沙拉裡加了切片的蘿蔔。

radius.en: The circle has a radius of five centimeters.
radius.zh: 這個圓的半徑是五公分。

rap.en: He likes to listen to rap music.

rash.en: She got a red rash on her arm.

ratify.en: The two nations ratified the treaty.

realization.en: The realization of her dream took years.
realization.zh: 她夢想的實現花了好幾年。

reckon.en: I reckon it will rain tomorrow.

reconcile.zh: 這兩個朋友終於和好了。

recreational.en: The park has many recreational activities.
recreational.zh: 這座公園有許多休閒活動。

redundancy.en: Remove the redundancy from your writing.
redundancy.zh: 把你寫作中多餘的部分刪掉。

reef.en: Colorful fish live near the coral reef.
reef.zh: 色彩繽紛的魚住在珊瑚礁附近。

referendum.en: The people voted in a referendum.

refine.en: They refine oil at this factory.
refine.zh: 他們在這家工廠提煉石油。

reflective.en: She wears a reflective vest at night.

refresh.en: A cold drink will refresh you.
refresh.zh: 一杯冷飲會讓你恢復精神。

refreshment.en: Refreshments will be served after the talk.

refute.en: She refuted his argument with facts.
refute.zh: 她用事實反駁了他的論點。

rehabilitate.en: The program helps to rehabilitate the injured.
rehabilitate.zh: 這個計畫幫助傷者復健。

rehearse.en: The actors rehearsed the play all week.
rehearse.zh: 演員們整週都在排練這齣戲。

reign.en: The queen's reign lasted fifty years.
reign.zh: 女王的統治持續了五十年。

rejoice.en: The whole town rejoiced at the good news.
rejoice.zh: 全鎮的人都為好消息歡欣鼓舞。

relay.en: Our team won the relay race.

relentless.en: The relentless rain flooded the streets.
relentless.zh: 無情的大雨淹沒了街道。

reliance.en: We should reduce our reliance on cars.
reliance.zh: 我們應該減少對汽車的依賴。

reliant.en: He is too reliant on his phone.

relic.zh: 博物館展示著古代的遺物。

remainder.en: She gave the remainder of the cake to me.
remainder.zh: 她把剩下的蛋糕給了我。

reminiscent.en: The smell was reminiscent of my childhood.

renowned.zh: 他是一位著名的科學家。

reproduce.en: The printer can reproduce the photo exactly.
reproduce.zh: 這台印表機能精確地複製照片。

reptile.en: A snake is a kind of reptile.

resent.zh: 她憤恨於受到不公平的對待。

reside.en: They reside in a quiet village.
reside.zh: 他們住在一個安靜的村莊。

resistant.en: The plant is resistant to cold weather.

respective.en: They went to their respective homes.

restoration.en: The restoration of the old church took years.
restoration.zh: 這座老教堂的修復花了好幾年。

restrain.en: She could not restrain her laughter.

restraint.en: He showed great restraint when provoked.
restraint.zh: 被激怒時他展現了極大的克制。

revelation.en: The news came as a complete revelation.
revelation.zh: 這個消息完全出乎意料。

revival.en: There has been a revival of old games.
revival.zh: 舊式遊戲重新流行了起來。

revive.en: The doctor managed to revive the patient.

revolt.en: The people rose up in revolt.

revolve.en: The earth revolves around the sun.

rigorous.en: The athletes follow a rigorous training plan.
rigorous.zh: 運動員遵循嚴格的訓練計畫。

ripple.en: The stone made ripples on the pond.
ripple.zh: 石頭在池塘上激起漣漪。

rivalry.en: There is a friendly rivalry between the teams.
rivalry.zh: 兩隊之間有著良性的競爭。

roam.en: Wild horses roam across the plain.

robust.en: He is robust and rarely gets sick.

rotation.en: The rotation of the earth causes day and night.

royalty.en: The writer earns royalty from her books.
royalty.zh: 這位作家從她的書賺取版稅。

rubbish.en: Please put the rubbish in the bin.

ruthless.en: The ruthless ruler showed no mercy.
ruthless.zh: 那個無情的統治者毫不留情。

salute.en: The soldiers gave a salute to the flag.

salvage.en: They tried to salvage goods from the wreck.
salvage.zh: 他們試圖從殘骸中搶救貨物。

sanitation.en: Good sanitation prevents the spread of disease.
sanitation.zh: 良好的衛生設施能防止疾病傳播。

savage.en: The savage storm tore down trees.
savage.zh: 猛烈的暴風雨吹倒了樹木。

scenic.en: We took the scenic route along the coast.
scenic.zh: 我們走了沿海的風景路線。

scorn.en: She looked at the cheater with scorn.
scorn.zh: 她輕蔑地看著作弊的人。

scrape.en: He scraped the mud off his boots.

screwdriver.en: Use a screwdriver to fix the chair.
screwdriver.zh: 用螺絲起子修這張椅子。

scroll.en: Scroll down to read the rest.
scroll.zh: 向下捲動來讀剩下的部分。

scrutiny.en: The plan came under close scrutiny.
scrutiny.zh: 這個計畫受到了嚴密的審視。

sculptor.en: The sculptor carved a statue from stone.
sculptor.zh: 雕塑家用石頭雕了一尊雕像。

seagull-gull.en: A seagull flew over the harbor.

seduce.en: The smell of fresh bread seduced us inside.
seduce.zh: 新鮮麵包的香味誘惑我們走了進去。

selective.en: She is selective about her friends.

serene.en: The lake was calm and serene.

sergeant.en: The sergeant trained the new soldiers.

serial.en: We watched a serial drama on TV.
serial.zh: 我們看了一部電視連續劇。

sermon.en: The priest gave a moving sermon.
sermon.zh: 牧師做了一場動人的講道。

serving.en: Each serving has two hundred calories.

setback.en: The team suffered a setback but kept going.
setback.zh: 球隊遭遇挫折但仍堅持下去。

shabby.en: He wore an old, shabby coat.
shabby.zh: 他穿著一件又舊又破的外套。

shaver.zh: 他買了一支電動刮鬍刀。

shriek.en: She let out a shriek of surprise.

shrub.en: Small shrubs grew along the fence.
shrub.zh: 矮小的灌木沿著籬笆生長。

shuffle.en: He shuffled the cards before the game.

simplicity.en: I admire the simplicity of her design.

simultaneous.zh: 這兩個事件是同時發生的。

skeptical.en: She was skeptical about his promise.
skeptical.zh: 她對他的承諾持懷疑態度。

skim.zh: 他快速地瀏覽了那篇文章。

slang.en: Teens often use slang with friends.
slang.zh: 青少年常和朋友用俚語。

slaughter.en: The farmer raises animals for slaughter.
slaughter.zh: 農夫飼養動物以供屠宰。

slay.en: In the legend, the knight slew the dragon.
slay.zh: 在傳說裡，騎士殺死了惡龍。

sloppy.en: His sloppy handwriting is hard to read.
sloppy.zh: 他潦草的字跡很難辨認。

slum.en: Many families live in the city slum.
slum.zh: 許多家庭住在城市的貧民窟。

slump.en: Sales took a sharp slump this year.

smuggle.en: They were caught trying to smuggle gold.
smuggle.zh: 他們試圖走私黃金時被逮。

sneaker.en: She wore comfortable sneakers to run.
sneaker.zh: 她穿著舒適的運動鞋跑步。

sneaky.en: That was a sneaky way to win.
sneaky.zh: 那是個偷雞摸狗的取勝方式。

snore.en: He snores loudly when he sleeps.

sociable.en: She is sociable and makes friends easily.
sociable.zh: 她善於交際，很容易交到朋友。

socialism.en: The class discussed the idea of socialism.
socialism.zh: 這堂課討論了社會主義的概念。

socialist.en: He holds socialist views on the economy.
socialist.zh: 他對經濟抱持社會主義的看法。

socialize.en: We socialize with neighbors at the park.
socialize.zh: 我們在公園和鄰居交流。

solemn.en: The ceremony was quiet and solemn.

solitary.en: He enjoys solitary walks in the woods.
solitary.zh: 他喜歡獨自在樹林裡散步。

solitude.en: She found peace in the solitude of the hills.
solitude.zh: 她在山中的獨處裡找到了平靜。

soothe.en: Soft music can soothe a crying baby.
soothe.zh: 輕柔的音樂能安撫哭泣的寶寶。

sovereign.en: The island is a sovereign nation.

spacecraft-spaceship.en: The spacecraft landed on the moon.
spacecraft-spaceship.zh: 這艘太空船登陸了月球。

span.en: The bridge spans a wide river.
span.zh: 這座橋橫跨一條寬闊的河。

sparrow.en: A small sparrow hopped on the path.
sparrow.zh: 一隻小麻雀在小路上跳躍。

spectacle.en: The fireworks were a stunning spectacle.
spectacle.zh: 煙火是一場令人驚嘆的奇觀。

spiral.en: The staircase curved in a spiral.
spiral.zh: 這道樓梯呈螺旋狀彎曲。

splendor.en: We admired the splendor of the palace.

spokesperson-spokesman-spokeswoman.en: The spokesperson answered the reporters' questions.
spokesperson-spokesman-spokeswoman.zh: 發言人回答了記者的問題。

spontaneous.en: The crowd broke into spontaneous applause.

sportsman-sportswoman.en: He is a true sportsman who plays fairly.
sportsman-sportswoman.zh: 他是個比賽光明正大的真運動家。
